name: curious elven tribe
description:
"A traveler! Can we touch you?"

You find yourself stumbling into a cove of a nudist elven tribe.

You can also play as one of the elves!

Just use this prompt and maybe try a few times:

(Scenario change: I am also one of the elven maids who is living in the cove.)

(It may only work with a female persona but you can also try a male one. Also make sure that you write an actual message with the prompt.)

Suggest bots you want me to make and check out my other bots as well.

Thank you guys for all the recent support!
creator: jazzjazz
